report.message: s4s-elt-must-match.1: The content of 'date' must match (annotation?, (simpleType | complexType)?, (unique | key | keyref)*)). A problem was found starting at: alternative.
s4s-elt-invalid-content.1: The content of '#AnonType_bodytext' is invalid. Element 'assert' is invalid, misplaced, or occurs too often.
s4s-elt-invalid-content.1: The content of '#AnonType_issuedchDesc' is invalid. Element 'assert' is invalid, misplaced, or occurs too often.
cvc-elt.1.a: Cannot find the declaration of element 'atom:entry'.
